HGSS.532.0000:
My daughter likes to mimic people.
Her mimicry has earned her the\r
nickname Copycat around here.
HGSS.532.0001:
My daughter is unique...\f
She would make friends, then her mimicry
would scare them away...\r
She only has a few friends.
HGSS.532.0002:
She recently lost the Poké Doll that
a boy gave her three years ago.\f
Ever since then, she’s gotten even
better at mimicry...
